name: Lofi.Parse

values.name: parseElement
values.comment:
Parses a single #lofi line into an Element

    parseElement "Click me #button #primary"

name: Lofi

unions.name: Element

unions.name: TagValue

cases: { texts : List Text, mentions : List Mention }
